message:
feat(python): numpy.fft fftshift/ifftshift wrapper parity (franken_numpy-sm8m)

Add fnp_python.fftshift(x, axes=None) and
fnp_python.ifftshift(x, axes=None) as passthrough delegators to
np.fft.fftshift / np.fft.ifftshift so single-axis, multi-axis
(tuple/list/None-default), odd/even length, and n-D array
broadcasting semantics match numpy exactly — including the
ifftshift(fftshift(x)) == x round-trip on odd-length arrays where
the two operations differ by one element.

Covered by one pyo3 oracle test with eight scenarios: even-length
1-D, odd-length 1-D (both fftshift and ifftshift), 2-D default
all-axes shift, 2-D explicit axes=0, 2-D axes=(0,1) tuple,
odd-length round-trip (ifftshift ∘ fftshift == identity), and
float input. Each compared via np.array_equal / np.allclose
against the numpy oracle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
